data.name: flxNetbank.ColumnInfo
data.value: 19,0,5,0,0,110,Columns:0{Width:24;AllowSorting:False;Caption:"*";AllowDragging:False;Style:"TextAlign:CenterCenter;";StyleFixed:"Font:MS UI Gothic, 12pt;Margins:1, 0, 0, 0;TextAlign:CenterCenter;TextEffect:Flat;TextDirection:Normal;ImageAlign:LeftCenter;Trimming:None;";} 1{Caption:"社員番号";AllowDragging:False;AllowEditing:False;Style:"Font:MS UI Gothic, 12pt;Margins:1, 0;TextAlign:CenterCenter;TextEffect:Flat;TextDirection:Normal;Trimming:None;";} 2{Width:42;Caption:"CD";AllowDragging:False;AllowEditing:False;Style:"Font:MS UI Gothic, 12pt;Margins:1, 0, 0, 0;TextAlign:CenterCenter;TextEffect:Flat;TextDirection:Normal;Trimming:None;";} 0;TextAlign:CenterCenter;TextEffect:Flat;TextDirection:Normal;Trimming:None;";} 16{Caption:"口座名義";StyleFixed:"TextAlign:CenterCenter;";} 18{Caption:"預金種目略名";Visible:False;}

data.name: flxNetbank.StyleInfo
data.value: Normal{Font:MS UI Gothic, 12pt;BackColor:Cornsilk;} Alternate{} Fixed{BackColor:Control;ForeColor:ControlText;Border:Flat,1,ControlDark,Both;BackgroundImageLayout:Hide;} Highlight{BackColor:Highlight;ForeColor:HighlightText;} Focus{} Editor{} Search{BackColor:Highlight;ForeColor:HighlightText;} Frozen{BackColor:Beige;} NewRow{ForeColor:GrayText;} EmptyArea{BackColor:AppWorkspace;Border:Flat,1,ControlDarkDark,Both;} SelectedColumnHeader{} SelectedRowHeader{} GrandTotal{BackColor:Black;ForeColor:White;} Subtotal0{BackColor:ControlDarkDark;ForeColor:White;} Subtotal1{BackColor:ControlDarkDark;ForeColor:White;} Subtotal2{BackColor:ControlDarkDark;ForeColor:White;} Subtotal3{BackColor:ControlDarkDark;ForeColor:White;} Subtotal4{BackColor:ControlDarkDark;ForeColor:White;} Subtotal5{BackColor:ControlDarkDark;ForeColor:White;} FilterEditor{} FirstCustomStyle{}
